daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are soft and introspective rn. You're picking up on subtle shifts in your surroundings—trust that intuition. It's a day to lean into your natural empathy and let it guide your choices without overthinking.
daily.love: Someone's energy is shifting toward you, but they're being shy about it. If you're single, a meaningful conversation could spark something real. Already coupled? Vulnerability is your superpower today—share something real.
daily.career: Your creative solutions are lowkey genius right now, even if they feel unconventional. This is the moment to pitch that idea you've been sitting on. Your confidence might be quiet, but it's magnetic.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness today—maybe a longer shower, stretching, or just moving slower than usual. Rest isn't laziness; it's you honoring what you need. Hydrate extra and check in with yourself mentally.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sector of intuition this week, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings hitting different—they're basically your cosmic group chat telling you what's up. Vibe shifts incoming.
weekly.love: Your emotional frequency is magnetic rn. Whether you're coupled up or solo, lean into authenticity over performance. Real connections thrive when you stop trying to be the 'chill' version of yourself.
weekly.career: Ideas are flowing but pace matters. You don't need to pitch everything immediately. Let your creative energy marinate a bit—your colleagues will notice the shift in your presence this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler rhythms. Skip the productivity grind and honor what actually refuels you—whether that's water, rest, or just existing without a to-do list. Self-care isn't lazy.
